description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a predominantly white and lavender exterior, accented by large rectangular windows and a flat roof. The interior is visible, revealing multiple rooms including a living area, kitchen, and bedrooms, all furnished with modern decor and appliances. The front facade is characterized by a prominent entryway and several windows, while the rear includes a large window and a secondary entrance. The structure is compact, with clean lines and a contemporary design, and the walls are punctuated by both small and large windows for ample natural light. The roof is flat, and the building sits directly on a low platform without visible steps or a raised foundation. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a white and lavender exterior, large windows, and a flat roof. The interior is visible, showing multiple furnished rooms and a clean, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and a glimpse into the living area and kitchen.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a large window, secondary entrance, and the open-plan living and dining spaces.
description_view_2: Side view displaying additional windows, the kitchen area, and part of the bedroom layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a prominent large window, visible interior rooms, and a secondary door.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on multiple facades
